reason: SolidWorks COM active object did not respond within the bounded probe.
fix_suggestion: 请先保存 SolidWorks 中的未保存文档，关闭可能阻塞的对话框；如仍不响应，请重启 SolidWorks 后重新运行 006 样张修正测试。
